marquee_details.full_text: ✦ You do not have to people-please to deserve love, care, company, or patience ✦
segments: You do not have to people-please to deserve love, care, company, or patience

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Your worth is not measured by chores, speed, emotional availability, or how much you can handle today ✦
segments: Your worth is not measured by chores, speed, emotional availability, or how much you can handle today

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Rest is allowed before burnout, not only after your body forces you to stop ✦
segments: Rest is allowed before burnout, not only after your body forces you to stop

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Partial completion is still progress ✦ One field, one sentence, one tiny win, one next step — it all counts ✦
segments: One field, one sentence, one tiny win, one next step — it all counts

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ The schedule is here to support you, not corner you ✦ The old plan can expire without you being a failure ✦
segments: The schedule is here to support you, not corner you
The old plan can expire without you being a failure

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Food, water, rest, meds-as-prescribed, hygiene, bathroom needs, and decompression are all real care ✦
segments: Food, water, rest, meds-as-prescribed, hygiene, bathroom needs, and decompression are all real care

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Your feelings are information, not a verdict, a failure, or a courtroom you have to win ✦
segments: Your feelings are information, not a verdict, a failure, or a courtroom you have to win

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ Play is regulation too ✦ Fun, comfort, rewards, soft blankets, safe snacks, and small joys do not need to be earned first ✦
segments: Fun, comfort, rewards, soft blankets, safe snacks, and small joys do not need to be earned first

marquee_details.full_text: ✦ You are loved when you help, when you rest, when you feel messy, and when you simply exist ✦
segments: You are loved when you help, when you rest, when you feel messy, and when you simply exist

positive_affirmations: Soft starts count, especially on an ADHD, pain, trauma, or overwhelm day.
Asking for help is not failing. It is using support before everything gets heavier.
Your needs matter even when someone else needs you too.
Caregiving is real work, and self-care is not separate from care.
You are allowed to stop, pause, reschedule, or choose the lower-energy version.
Data is for kindness, not punishment. Tracking is information, not a grade.
You do not have to explain your pain perfectly for it to be real.
Boundaries are not abandonment. You can be gentle and still say no.
You deserve softness that does not ask you to perform before you receive it.
